name: Date Coleslaw with Orange-Ginger Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp White Wine or Cider Vinegar
2 tbsp Olive Oil or Vegetable Oil
7 cups Green and Red Cabbage, coarsely shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the dates into 1/2-inch pieces; set aside.
2. To make the dressing: Whisk together the zest, orange juice, wine or vinegar, garlic, ginger, salt, and pepper. Next, whisk in the oil.
3. Combine the vegetables with the dressing.
